name: Newspaper
description: Traditional newspaper broadsheet typography and layout.

preview.sampleText: Traditional broadsheet typography meets the digital age.

classes.h1: text-4xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 border-b-2 border-gray-900 dark:border-gray-100 pb-2 leading-tight
classes.h2: text-2xl font-bold mb-3 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 border-b border-gray-400 dark:border-gray-500 pb-1
classes.h3: text-xl font-semibold mb-3 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 italic
classes.h6: text-sm font-bold mb-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
classes.tr: border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 even:bg-yellow-50 odd:bg-white dark:even:bg-gray-700 dark:odd:bg-gray-800
classes.th: border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 p-2 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-red-800 dark:border-red-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg leading-relaxed
classes.code: bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 px-1 rounded font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200
classes.pre: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600
